Internal phosphorus kinetics helpers

Source: R/P_kinetics.R
internal_p_kinetics.Rd

Internal helper that derives kinetic coefficients from C1000, Cstar, and Ks. Two formulations are supported:

compute_DMSTA_kvals(C1000, Cstar, Ks)

Arguments

C1000

Numeric scalar. Concentration-like parameter (units consistent with the DMSTAr kinetic formulation).

Cstar

Numeric scalar. Kinetic threshold parameter. If negative, the transformed kinetics (PModel 2) are used.

Ks

Numeric scalar. Rate parameter on the time step of interest.

Value

A named list with elements:

K1

Numeric scalar.

K2

Numeric scalar.

K3

Numeric scalar.

PModel

Integer scalar: 1L, 2L, or NA_integer_.

Details

  • PModel 1 (standard): used when C1000 > 0, Ks > 0, and Cstar > 0.

  • PModel 2 (transformed/special): triggered when Cstar < 0, interpreted as G = -Cstar.

If inputs do not define a valid kinetic model, the function returns K1 = K2 = K3 = 0 and PModel = NA_integer_.

Contents

Developed by Paul Julian.
